segments.text: the biggest problem factor in our relationships are fights we don't know what to do when we fight with somebody that we love or when we get into a fight
with somebody that we want to maintain long-term relationships with now how you handle the moment of the fight or how
you handle or repair that fight also dictates the quality of your relationship or your friendship over a
long period of time don't expect to not have fights but rather focus on repairing those fights
